context.revisionDescription: Editor-only change: popover wrapper div in FooterInfoSocialItem.tsx had className="p-4" replaced with style={{ padding: "16px", minWidth: "300px" }}. No PHP counterpart exists for the Popover component — no sync check required.

build.notes: bun run build and lint both pass with zero errors. Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — identical set to prior runs, none introduced by this change.

lint.notes: No warnings in any Footer block files.

notes: The popover wrapper div at line 77 correctly uses style={{ padding: "16px", minWidth: "300px" }} — both properties are present in a single style object on the same element.

The minWidth: "300px" was already present as a separate style prop on the prior version of this div; the fix correctly merged it with the new padding value into one style object rather than leaving two style props.
className="p-4" has been fully removed — no residual Tailwind class remains.

No PHP counterpart exists for this Popover component. The Popover renders inside the Gutenberg block editor interface only; it has no frontend output and no PHP template. TSX/PHP sync check is not applicable for this element.

tsxPhpSync.reason: Popover is editor-only with no PHP counterpart. The style change applies solely to the Gutenberg editor interface. validate_all sync check passes (only the known false-positive InspectorControls/section root wrapper warning, unchanged across all prior runs).

registration.notes: No block.json changes in this revision. Confirmed passing via validate_all.

passedChecks: Lint passes with no Footer-specific warnings
Popover wrapper div at FooterInfoSocialItem.tsx line 77: style={{ padding: "16px", minWidth: "300px" }} correctly set
className="p-4" fully removed — no residual Tailwind class
Both padding and minWidth present in a single merged style object
validate_all passes: zero errors, sync passes, registration passes
PHP sync correctly not required — Popover is editor-only with no frontend HTML output
